title: Unescape HTML characters in inspect output
body:
By default, the JSON encoder from the Go standard library escapes the HTML characters which causes the maintainer output looks strange:

```
"maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e"
```
Instead of:
```
"maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers <docker-maint@nginx.com>"
```

This patch fixes this issue in `buildah-inspect` only as this is the only place that such characters might be displayed.

closes #417

comments.body: I think you should only do this iff the stdout is a tty.  If you were using buildah inspect as output that ended up in html, this would cause issues.
@rhatdan good call. Let me do it.

@ripcurld0 Could you open a similar PR for buildah in libpod?
LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 2ad59b8 has been approved by `rhatdan`
